reforms.description: The Federal Council adopted a special programme costing SF207 million to promote information and engineering sciences over a period of five years.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: This funding is expected to enhance research and development in critical fields, thereby fostering innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The programme was adopted by Parliament.
reforms.importance_rationale: This programme represents a significant investment in the promotion of key scientific fields, which can lead to advancements in technology and industry.
reforms.source_quote: The following economically relevant initiatives are passed by Parliament: - Adoption of a special programme, costing SF207 million, to promote information and engineering sciences over a period of five years;
